subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the sanctified breezes in this Most Great Dispensation and the Cycle of the Ancient Beauty, wherein divine and infinite bounties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بنفحات تقدیس در این دور اعظم و کور جمال قدم که فیض نامتناهی الهی
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @differences in human capacity
